name: Garlo Nicon
cooked: I think ECDSA signature can simply commit to the quantum one inside R-value. And then, the quantum space can be just sigops-based: we allow up to N quantum signatures, which would have some constant size.
topic_title: Segwit commitment to post-quantum witness data?
topic_html_title: Segwit commitment to post-quantum witness data?
raw: I think ECDSA signature can simply commit to the quantum one inside R-value. And then, the quantum space can be just sigops-based: we allow up to N quantum signatures, which would have some constant size.
